caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt, a dark vest, and a red and white traditional accessory, performs on a stage in front of an audience. He stands behind a microphone and plays an acoustic guitar. The setting features a backdrop of vertical wooden slats and podiums. Several audience members are visible from behind, including people with gray and brown hair, some wearing colorful clothing like a blue patterned shawl and a yellow top. In the background, other individuals are seated at podiums. Throughout the sequence, the camera zooms in on the performer, shifting from a wide shot that includes more of the audience and other people on stage to a closer view focusing on the man. The text "ORCA" appears as a logo on the right side of the screen in every frame.
